sections.paragraph:
διαλογίζομαι [διά, λογίζομαι fr. λέγω, cp. λόγος] ‘engage in a mental process involving back and forth movement of ideas’, a kind of mental ping-ponging, in NT esp. in ref. to questioning someone’s activity or expression

—a. of overt expression of various ideas within a group argue, discuss, deliberate Mk 8:16f; 9:33; Lk 20:14.

—b. with focus on an inward process reason, think, consider Mt 16:7 al.; Mk 2:6; Lk 1:29; 3:15; 12:17.
